summary: This is an extremely brief link post where Joel Spolsky shares that he was interviewed by Bob Walsh and Michael Lehman for The MicroISV Show on Channel 9. The post contains no substantive argument or analysis, serving purely as a pointer to external content. It reflects Joel's practice of cross-promoting his media appearances on his blog.
key_points: Joel was interviewed for The MicroISV Show, a program focused on micro independent software vendors
The interview was hosted by Bob Walsh and Michael Lehman on Microsoft's Channel 9 platform
The post is a minimal link-only entry with no editorial commentary
key_insight: This is a brief promotional link post directing readers to an external interview about micro-ISV topics, with no substantive content of its own.
